Document:
# Chems and Addiction
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Chems_and_Addiction"]
The Wasteland runs on chemistry. Stimpaks keep you breathing, combat chems give you an edge, and addiction takes it all away. Know what you are putting into your body.
## Stimpaks
[bold][color=#a4885c]Item[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Effect[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Overdose[/color][/bold]
[bold]Stimpak[/bold]
Heals Brute/Burn/Airloss at -2.5/tick. Stops bleeding (-2). Grants recovery status (stand from crit).
30u: bonus healing + 0.3 poison/tick. 50u: +1.5 poison/tick (pushes to crit, cannot kill).
[bold]Dirty Stimpak[/bold]
Heals at -1.5/tick. +0.1 radiation/tick. Stops bleeding (-1). Contaminated variant.
30u: +0.2 poison/tick. 50u: +1.0 poison/tick.
[bold][color=#cc3333]Super Stimpak[/color][/bold]
Heals at -6.125/tick. Stops bleeding (-3). Grants recovery status. [color=#cc3333]Two at once = near-guaranteed crit.[/color]
30u: +4.5 poison + 0.75 cellular damage/tick. Halves movement speed. [color=#cc3333]Cellular damage is permanent.[/color]
## Other Medical Items
[bold][color=#a4885c]Item[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Effect[/color][/bold]
[bold]Healing Powder[/bold]
Heals Brute/Burn at -1.5/tick. Vision blur. Stops bleeding (-0.5). Slow metabolism. Legion/tribal standard issue. Vomiting at 30u.
[bold]Healing Poultice[/bold]
Heals at -3.0/tick. Stops bleeding (-1.0). Causes jitter. Faster metabolism. Vomiting at 25u.
[bold]RadAway[/bold]
Removes accumulated radiation damage. Non-addictive.
[bold]Antidote[/bold]
Neutralizes poison damage. Counter to poisoning.
## Combat Chems
[bold][color=#cc3333]WARNING:[/color][/bold] Overdose pushes to critical but [bold]never kills[/bold] directly. Damage scales at 0.05 per excess unit. All combat chems carry addiction risk.
[bold][color=#a4885c]Chem[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Effect[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Overdose[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Withdrawal[/color][/bold]
[bold]Jet[/bold]
+10% walk/sprint speed. Removes stun/knockdown.
30+ units: asphyxiation
Speed 0.80x, stamina drain 5.0
[bold]Turbo[/bold]
+20% walk/sprint speed. Drunk effect. Removes stun.
15+ units: asphyxiation
Speed 0.70x, stamina drain 7.0
[bold]Psycho[/bold]
+2 melee strength. Drunk effect.
30+ units: asphyxiation
Brute damage 0.2/tick, stamina drain 6.0
[bold]Buffout[/bold]
+2 strength. Minor brute healing (-0.3).
30+ units: asphyxiation
Brute damage 0.2/tick, stamina drain 8.0
[bold]Mentats[/bold]
Intelligence and perception boost.
—
Stamina drain (moderate)
[bold]Cateye[/bold]
Night vision (5 seconds per dose).
—
Stamina drain 2.0
[bold]Daytripper[/bold]
Visual hallucinations, rainbow vision.
—
Speed 0.90x, stamina drain 4.0
[bold]Buffjet[/bold]
Combined Buffout + Jet effects.
Combined thresholds
Combined withdrawal
[bold]Bufftats[/bold]
Combined Mentats + Buffout effects.
Combined thresholds
Combined withdrawal
## Withdrawal
Withdrawal ticks every [bold]15 seconds[/bold]. Effects include speed penalties, stamina drain, health damage, and negative mood modifiers.
[bold][color=#a4885c]Severity[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Time Remaining / Symptoms[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#cc3333]Severe[/color][/bold] (> 120s)
Maximum speed penalty, stamina drain, health damage, mood effects
[bold][color=#ffb000]Moderate[/color][/bold] (60-120s)
Reduced penalties, still noticeable
[bold][color=#a4885c]Mild[/color][/bold] (15-60s)
Minor penalties
[bold]Fading[/bold] (under 15s)
Nearly clean
## Chem Recipes
[bold][color=#a4885c]Chem[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Recipe[/color][/bold]
[bold][color=#a4885c]Notes[/color][/bold]
Jet
Ammonia 1 + Abraxo 1 (heated to 374C)
Requires heat source
Psycho
Bloatfly Acid 1 + Broc Extract 2 + Blood 1 + Antiseptic 2
Complex, rare ingredients
Turbo
Cazador Acid 1 + Broc Extract 1 + Jet 1 + Turpentine 1
Requires Jet as base
Mentats
Abraxo 1 + Lead 1
Simple recipe
Buffjet
Jet 1 + Buffout 1
Combination
Bufftats
Mentats 1 + Buffout 1
Combination
Hydra
Scorpion Tail 1 + Fungus Extract 1 + Nightstalker Blood 1
Healing/stat hybrid
Stimpak
Broc Extract 1 + Xander Extract 1 + Blood 1
Non-addictive
RadAway
Fungus Extract (Rad) 1 + Antiseptic 2 + Water 2
Non-addictive
